issues.title: Official website documentation tutorial error
issues.body: In the documentation on the Spring official website, under the Spring AI module in section 2, "Run the application," it should be ./mvnw spring-boot:run instead of ./mvw spring-boot:run.

labels.name: duplicate
labels.description: This issue or pull request already exists

issues.title: MariaDB Vector
issues.body: Hello, I noticed a list of vector databases on the Spring AI framework page: https://spring.io/projects/spring-ai. I'm excited for MariaDB as they have released their MariaDB vector preview (see [project page](https://mariadb.org/projects/mariadb-vector/) and [blog](https://mariadb.org/vector-preview/)). How could MariaDB be added to the list? Thanks for any comments on this.

comments.body: Spring AI 1.0 has MariaDB Vector store: https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs/mariadb.html
Please let us know if you would like to add anything specific to MariaDB Vector store. Feel free to contribute as well. Thanks!

issues.title: How to use Mistrial AI over the OpenAI API
issues.body:
The Mistral AI API is (mostly) OpenAI API compatible. Therefore one can reuse the Spring AI OpenAI integration to interact with the Mistral endpoints.

Provide documentation and examples how to use the Spring AI OpenAI client to talk interact with Mistral AI.
